headline: 1 Large-Cap Stock Worth Your Attention and 2 We Avoid
summary: Large-cap stocks usually command their industries because they have the scale to drive market trends. The flip side though is that their sheer size can limit growth as expanding further becomes an increasingly challenging task.

headline: Chubb’s Higher Dividend And New Buybacks Put Cash Returns In Focus
summary: Chubb (NYSE:CB) has approved a 5.2% increase in its annual dividend, marking the 33rd consecutive yearly raise. The company also authorized a new $7.5b share repurchase program as part of its capital return approach. These actions highlight ongoing efforts to return capital to shareholders through both dividends and buybacks. For investors watching Chubb at a share price of $312.27, the latest capital return moves come after a mixed run in the stock. Shares are up 6.7% over the past year...
